content.text: resolve.ts looks up the same sku twice. Remove the duplicate lookup.

content.content:
Permission to write was denied by a hook.
Reason: Probity: this replaces discountedPrice(sku) with listPrice(sku) and an inline round(...). discountedPrice is not guaranteed to equal round(listPrice(...)) (it may apply a discount), so this drops the discount and changes the quoted price. That is a behavior change with no failing test driving it.
